topology.skills: Installed and executed by the user's Codex host.
topology.graph: One loopback-only Neo4j Community container and persistent volume per initialized project.
topology.mcp: One project-local stdio neo4j-mcp process configured as nacl_neo4j in the project's .codex/config.toml.

dataCategories.contents: NaCl configuration, graph templates, methodology artifacts, and secret-free MCP configuration.
Project requirements, analysis, architecture, delivery state, leases, revisions, migrations, and audit provenance.
One generated Neo4j password stored only in graph-infra/.env and read by the project-local launcher.
Neo4j MCP requests and results exchanged between Codex and the local project process.

securityControls: No public or hosted NaCl MCP service.
No OAuth, reviewer credential, author analytics, or author-controlled data transfer.
Per-project container, named volume, ports, secret, and MCP configuration.
Pinned neo4j-mcp release archive and binary checksums, strict immutable receipt, no project cache trust, and binary-digest verification before every spawn.
No secret in .codex/config.toml, .env.example, logs, process arguments, bundle, or repository.
The managed Codex TOML section is append-only, atomic, idempotent, and fails closed on malformed, duplicate, ambiguous, or conflicting state while preserving unrelated bytes.

Project launcher validates secret file type, symlink state, POSIX mode or Windows ACL, keys, value, canonical binary path, receipt, and binary digest before spawning neo4j-mcp with only five allowlisted environment keys.
Neo4j Community is pinned to exact tag 5.24.2-community and immutable OCI index digest sha256:2e7e4eea5bc1eec581a3097c018dfeb3747f3638e67a963c10554825c31c1425.

The pinned Neo4j image embeds APOC Core 5.24.2; startup copies that image-bound JAR locally, bootstrap verifies its SHA-256 and runtime version/meta capability, and no separate plugin download occurs.
Bundled NaCl named queries use core Cypher only; APOC is present solely because the pinned neo4j-mcp runtime requires its meta component.
No-clobber conflicts fail closed and graph writes retain confirmation, parameterization, checksum-ledgered migrations, concurrency, and read-back gates.

A failed fresh bootstrap removes only resources created by that run and restores prior config/gitignore bytes; pre-existing volumes are preserved and reported as partial-state inventory when rollback cannot undo graph writes.

externalNetwork.purpose: Download the pinned official neo4j-mcp binary during first bootstrap only.
externalNetwork.controls: Exact release asset plus bundled SHA-256 verification; latest is not used by the Skills-only workflow.

externalNetwork.purpose: Pull the pinned Neo4j Community image when it is not already available locally.
externalNetwork.controls: Exact 5.24.2-community tag plus immutable OCI index digest and loopback-only runtime.

knownLimitations: Docker, Node.js, and supported neo4j-mcp release assets are local prerequisites.
A new Codex task is required after nacl-init writes project .codex/config.toml; hot reload is not claimed.
The exact portal upload and clean reviewer-machine journey remain NOT_RUN until submission.
